name: Advanced Flower Capital Inc.
business: Advanced Flower Capital Inc. is an institutional lender that originates, structures, underwrites, invests in, and manages senior secured loans and other debt securities, specializing in loans to cannabis industry operators in states that have legalized medical and/or adult-use cannabis. Effective January 1, 2026, the company converted to a business development company (BDC) and expanded its investment mandate to include loans to companies ancillary to the cannabis industry and other middle-market companies. The company aims to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns through cash distributions and capital appreciation.
sellsTo: cannabis industry operators in states that have legalized medical and/or adult-use cannabis
public and privately held middle-market companies

exposures.sentence: During the year ended December 31, 2025, we primarily originated, structured, underwrote, invested in and managed senior secured loans and other types of mortgage loans and debt securities, with a specialization in loans to cannabis industry operators in states that have legalized medical and/or adult-use cannabis.

catalysts.event: Placed Private Company K in consensual receivership
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, AFC Agent placed Private Company K in a consensual receivership to operate the collateral assets for the benefit of the Company, as a secured lender, and all other stakeholders.

catalysts.event: Entered into $15.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company U
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we entered into a $15.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company U, which was fully funded at closing.

catalysts.event: Entered into $14.0 million senior secured credit facility with Subsidiaries of Private Company V
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we entered into a $14.0 million senior secured credit facility with Subsidiaries of Private Company V.

catalysts.event: Amendment Number Four to Revolving Credit Facility extended maturity to April 29, 2028
catalysts.sentence: Amendment Number Four, among other things, (i) extends the maturity date of the Revolving Credit Agreement to April 29, 2028, (ii) increases the interest rate floor from 4.00% to 7.00%, (iii) permits certain restricted payments to be made upon the Company meeting certain terms and conditions, and (iv) expands the collateral secured under the Revolving Credit Agreement from assets comprising of or relating to loan obligations designed for inclusion in the borrower base to substantially all of the Company's and its subsidiaries assets.

catalysts.event: Amendment Number Five increased commitment by $20.0 million to $50.0 million total
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we entered into Amendment Number Five to the Loan and Security Agreement ( Amendment Number Five ), by and among the Company, as borrower, the lenders party thereto, and the lead arranger, bookrunner and administrative party thereto. Amendment Number Five, among other things, increased the commitment from the lenders by $20.0 million to a total aggregate commitment of $50.0 million.

catalysts.event: Purchased $10.0 million senior secured term loan to Subsidiary of Public Company S
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we entered into an agreement to purchase $10.0 million in outstanding principal amount of a senior secured term loan to Subsidiary of Public Company S, a publicly traded operator, at a 4.0% discount.

catalysts.event: Third amendment to credit agreement with Private Company O increased commitment by $3.0 million
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we entered into the third amendment to the credit agreement with Private Company O, which, among other things, increased the loan commitment by an additional $3.0 million under the terms of the existing credit agreement, extended the draw period and amortization start date until August 1, 2027 and increased the unused fee from 2.0% to 3.15%.

catalysts.event: Purchased $5.0 million senior secured term loan to Subsidiary of Public Company T
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we entered into an agreement to purchase $5.0 million in outstanding principal amount of a senior secured term loan to Subsidiary of Public Company T, a publicly traded operator, at par.

catalysts.event: Completed conversion from REIT to BDC
catalysts.sentence: Effective January 1, 2026, we completed our Conversion to a BDC, ceased operating as a mortgage REIT, and became subject to the regulatory requirements applicable to BDCs under the 1940 Act.

catalysts.event: Entered into $60.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company X
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into a $60.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company X, which was fully funded at closing.

catalysts.event: Fully repaid on loan with Private Company L at par plus accrued interest
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we were fully repaid on our loan with Private Company L at par plus accrued interest.

catalysts.event: Fully repaid on loan with Private Company O at par plus accrued interest
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we were fully repaid on our loan with Private Company O at par plus accrued interest.

catalysts.event: Entered into new $20.0 million credit facility with TCGSL LLC
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company entered into a new credit facility with TCGSL LLC, an affiliate of the Company (the TCGSL Credit Facility ).

catalysts.event: Committed $29.7 million of a $60.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company Y
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we committed $29.7 million of a $60.0 million senior secured credit facility with Private Company Y, of which $20.1 million was funded at closing.
